category_sources: Official homepage https://libmtp.sourceforge.net/ describes libmtp as an Initiator implementation of Media Transfer Protocol.
source_facts.description: Implementation of Microsoft's Media Transfer Protocol (MTP)
docs_sources: Official homepage directs users to README and source files for device information.
Official homepage provides project overview and links the README for project history and status.
repo_sources: Official homepage https://libmtp.sourceforge.net/ links Browse GIT to the SourceForge code browser.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes libmtp as a POSIX library implementing MTP Basic.
source_facts.description identifies Microsoft Media Transfer Protocol implementation.
